title: tanacetum vulgare var. boreale
intro: Tanacetum vulgare var. boreale, also known as Boreal Tansy or Northern Tansy, is a variant of the Tansy plant, a flowering perennial native to northern Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to repel insects and ward off diseases due to its compounds such as thujone and camphor. The health benefits of Tanacetum vulgare var. boreale include its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues, inflammation, and as a treatment for fever and colds, as well as its potential in reducing the severity of allergies and improving skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried flowers and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or added to topical creams and salves for various health benefits.
